title: metrosideros collina var. incana
intro: Metrosideros collina var. incana is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Metrosideros collina plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. The plant is native to the Pacific Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The bark and leaves of the Metrosideros collina var. incana plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
